_note: Expected outputs authored against the upstream Apache-2.0 reference decoder (reference/upstream-codec.js) using the ORACLE method: TTN example inputs are reused, but the normalized expected.data is authored here (vibration status byte -> action.motion.detected, Volt/10 -> battery V, low-battery high bit -> lowBattery extra). Synthetic vectors cover the detected/not-detected motion states and the low-battery flag. Device-info and config frames carry no measurement and are reported as errors.

uplink.description: Status report, vibration detected (status byte = 1, battery 3.0 V)
Synthetic: status report, no vibration (status byte = 0, battery 3.6 V)
Synthetic: status report, vibration detected with low-battery flag (high bit of byte 3 set, 2.5 V)
Startup / device-info frame (reportType 0x00) carries no measurement
Config response on fPort 7 carries no measurement
